Docs.param: The name of the Azure region.
Docs.summary:
Only returns the latest version of each node image. For example there may be an AKSUbuntu-1804gen2containerd-2024.01.26, but only AKSUbuntu-1804gen2containerd-2024.02.02 is visible in this list.
Request Path. /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.ContainerService/locations/{location}/nodeImageVersions.
Operation Id. ContainerServiceOperationGroup_ListNodeImageVersions.
Default Api Version. 2026-01-02-preview.
Docs.returns: A collection of that may take multiple service requests to iterate over.

Docs.param: The name of the Azure region.
To Include Extended Locations information or not in the response.
Docs.summary:
Gets the list of VM SKUs accepted by AKS when creating node pools in a specified location. AKS will perform a best effort approach to provision the requested VM SKUs, but availability is not guaranteed.
Request Path. /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.ContainerService/locations/{location}/vmSkus.
Operation Id. VmSkusOperationGroup_List.
Default Api Version. 2026-01-02-preview.
Docs.returns: A collection of that may take multiple service requests to iterate over.
